contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix vault status/followups pages — full runtime-config schema, resilient JS, no-cache middleware
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/237
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/238
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/239
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/240
  
  Details:
  Fixed three bugs on sophia.truesight.me vault pages:\n\n1. /vault/api/runtime-config returned only 4 flat fields but status.html JS expected nested schema (data.git.commit, data.llm.provider). TypeError crashed all three page sections to catch blocks. Fixed backend to return full schema + made JS resilient with fallback objects.\n\n2. status.html deployed-version section called esc() function that was only defined inside a sibling .then() handler scope. ReferenceError -> 'Failed to load deployed version'. Switched to encodeURIComponent().\n\n3. followups.html called f.chat_id.replace() on a JSON number (-1003919341801, not a string). TypeError -> 'Network error loading follow-ups'. Added String() conversion.\n\nAlso added NoCacheHTMLMiddleware (Cache-Control: no-store) to prevent browsers from caching stale HTML/JS after deploys.\n\nPRs: #237, #238, #239, #240
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
